privileged_info_summary: The task configures build trigger chains on three Jenkins jobs: inventory-build, inventory-test, and inventory-deploy. The expected chain has inventory-build triggering inventory-test on success, which then triggers inventory-deploy on success. All job names and expected trigger relationships are correctly specified in the metadata. The data is synthetic, with jobs created via Jenkins XML definitions in setup_task.sh with simulated build output messages simulating Maven compilation, testing, and deployment stages.
